title: carex bengalensis var. nagporensis
intro: Carex bengalensis var. nagporensis, also known as Nagpore sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the Carex genus, which includes a wide range of sedge species. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and providing relief from pain and inflammation. In herbal preparations, Carex bengalensis var. nagporensis is often used to make decoctions, infusions, and powders, which are used to treat various ailments.
